nasb.text: Next Eleazar the priest shall take some of its blood with his finger and sprinkle some of its blood toward the front of the tent of meeting seven times.

esv.text: And Eleazar the priest shall take some of its blood with his finger, and sprinkle some of its blood toward the front of the tent of meeting seven times.

cnv.text: 以利亞撒祭司要用指頭蘸牛血，向會幕前面灑七次。

ccb.text: 以利亚撒祭司要用指头蘸牛血，向会幕前面弹七次。
